title: PermissionScope
description: Defines an OAuth 2.0 delegated permission scope exposed by a web API application

value.description: The value that identifies the scope in OAuth 2.0 authorization requests

type.description: Whether the scope can be consented to by a user or requires admin consent

adminConsentDisplayName.description: Display name shown on the admin consent experience

adminConsentDescription.description: Description shown on the admin consent experience

userConsentDisplayName.description: Display name shown on the user consent experience

userConsentDescription.description: Description shown on the user consent experience

isEnabled.description: Whether the scope is enabled and can be requested
